summary: Completed comprehensive security testing for Dolaglobo Finance banking app. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Security headers, XSS protection, HTTPS enforcement, and auth flows are properly implemented.

issues: CSP frame-ancestors directive ignored in meta tag (expected browser behavior, not a bug)
X-Frame-Options meta tag ignored (expected, should be HTTP header only)

critical_code_review_comments: CORS_ORIGINS='*' in backend/.env is overly permissive for production - consider restricting to specific domains
CSP includes 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' for scripts - acceptable for React but could be tightened with nonces in production
seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_ prefix via /api/auth/register endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: security headers (8 tests), security status endpoint (2 tests), CORS (2 tests), auth endpoints (4 tests), wallet auth (1 test), public endpoints (5 tests), admin auth (2 tests), input sanitization (1 test). Frontend verified: landing page loads with Dolaglobo branding, login page at /login, register page at /register, registration flow triggers OTP verification, CSP meta tag present with upgrade-insecure-requests.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/security/status: Returns all security configurations as true
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/register: Creates user and triggers OTP verification
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: Validates credentials and returns token or OTP requirement
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/content/legal: Public endpoint, returns both terms and privacy
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/kyc/email-info: Public endpoint, returns KYC email address

security_fixes_verified.https_internal_links: Fixed via HSTS header and CSP upgrade-insecure-requests
security_fixes_verified.xss_protection: Fixed via CSP, X-XSS-Protection header, and input sanitization
security_fixes_verified.http_urls_site_level: Fixed via HSTS with preload directive
security_fixes_verified.form_posting_to_http: Fixed via CSP form-action 'self' https: directive

mocked_apis.note: SMS via Africa's Talking, MPESA Daraja STK Push, and Instalipa Airtime are MOCKED/SIMULATED when environment variables are not configured
